question_text: Which of the following best explains why a van de Graaff generator can produce a large static charge?

options.label: A
options.text: It uses friction to transfer many electrons onto a metal dome

options.label: B
options.text: It uses a battery to create electricity

options.label: C
options.text: It attracts electrons from the surrounding air

options.label: D
options.text: It converts heat energy into electrical charge

explanation: A van de Graaff generator continuously transfers electrons via friction between a moving belt and the dome, allowing charge to build up to very high levels over time.
